title: Parallelize independent sub-reconcilers
summary: Addressed external review #2 feedback from gndrmnn: removed the deprecated `r.Requeue` early-return branch from `shortestRequeue`, updated the doc comment, and deleted the corresponding `TestShortestRequeue_RequeueTrue` test. The change is minimal, correct, and leaves all remaining code paths fully tested.

tests_checklist.item: All existing unit tests pass (go test -race -count=1)
shortestRequeue: AllZero, SingleNonZero, PicksMinimum, NoArgs cover all remaining branches
Removed TestShortestRequeue_RequeueTrue no longer needed (tested deleted code path)
Zero data races reported by -race detector

code_quality_checklist.item: Doc comment updated to match simplified behavior
No references to deprecated Requeue field remain in production code
Change is minimal — only removes the deprecated branch and its test

security_checklist.item: No security-relevant changes in this diff

architecture_checklist.item: No architectural changes — scoped to removing deprecated API usage

defensive_checklist.item: No external inputs affected by this change
